<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" modified="2026-03-13T09:20:00.000Z" agent="Copilot" version="24.0.0" type="device"> <diagram id="alz-corp-aks-automatic" name="ALZ Corp - AKS Automatic"> <mxGraphModel dx="2200" dy="1400" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="2800" pageHeight="1800" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" />
<!-- ================================================================ --> <!-- TITLE --> <!-- ================================================================ --> <mxCell id="title" value="<b>AKS Automatic in ALZ Corp (Private Connectivity)</b>
Egress forced through hub Azure Firewall via UDR. Ingress via App Routing internal LB." style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];autosize=0;fontSize=14;fontColor=#333333;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="700" y="15" width="900" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ================================================================ --> <!-- ON-PREMISES --> <!-- ================================================================ --> <mxCell id="onprem-boundary" value="" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F5F5;strokeColor=#999999;dashed=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="30" y="200" width="180" height="520" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="onprem-label" value="<b>On-Premises</b>" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=12;fontColor=#333333;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="55" y="210" width="130" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="onprem-user" value="Corp User /
Browser" style="shape=mxgraph.azure.user;fillColor=#505050;fontColor=#333333;strokeColor=none;fontSize=9;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="90" y="260" width="40" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="onprem-dns" value="On-Prem DNS

(API consumer)" style="shape=mxgraph.azure.cloud;fillColor=#505050;fontColor=#333333;strokeColor=none;fontSize=8;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="75" y="500" width="60" height="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="onprem-devops" value="DevOps

(TLS certs)" style="shape=mxgraph.azure.key_vault;fillColor=#0078D4;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;fontSize=7;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1440" y="380" width="40" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pe-kv-label" value="PE" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E83123;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=6;strokeColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1445" y="418" width="20" height="12" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pe-sa" value="Storage
Account" style="shape=mxgraph.azure.storage;fillColor=#0078D4;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;fontSize=7;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1530" y="380" width="40" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pe-sa-label" value="PE" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E83123;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=6;strokeColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1535" y="418" width="20" height="12" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pe-sql" value="Azure SQL /
CosmosDB" style="shape=mxgraph.azure.sql_database;fillColor=#0078D4;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;fontSize=7;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1620" y="380" width="40" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pe-sql-label" value="PE" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E83123;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=6;strokeColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1625" y="418" width="20" height="12" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pe-note" value="All PaaS services accessed via Private Endpoints only
(public access disabled). DNS resolved via Hub Private DNS Zones." style="text;html=1;align=left;fontSize=7;fontColor=#666666;spacingLeft=5;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1330" y="445" width="350" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pe-mi" value="Managed Identity
(UserAssigned)" style="shape=mxgraph.azure.managed_identities;fillColor=#0078D4;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;fontSize=7;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1350" y="480" width="40" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pe-mi-note" value="Needs: Network Contributor (VNet), DNS Zone Contributor (DNS),
AcrPull (ACR), Key Vault Secrets User (KV)" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontSize=6;fontColor=#666666;spacingLeft=5;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1400" y="480" width="300" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Node RG (read-only) --> <mxCell id="spoke-nrg" value="<b>Node Resource Group</b> (ReadOnly – managed by AKS)
VMSS, Load Balancers, Managed Disks, Public IPs (internal)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F5F5;strokeColor=#CCCCCC;fontSize=8;verticalAlign=middle;align=center;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="780" y="610" width="460" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ================================================================ --> <!-- INTERNET (egress target) --> <!-- ================================================================ --> <mxCell id="internet" value="Internet
(mcr.microsoft.com,
packages.microsoft.com,
management.azure.com, ...)" style="shape=mxgraph.azure.cloud;fillColor=#59B4D9;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;fontSize=8;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="340" y="860" width="110" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ================================================================ --> <!-- ARROWS – EXPRESSROUTE / VPN --> <!-- ================================================================ --> <mxCell id="arrow-er" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;strokeWidth=3;strokeColor=#D6B656;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" edge="1" parent="1" source="onprem-boundary" target="hub-ergw"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow-er-label" value="ExpressRoute / S2S VPN" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=8;fontColor=#D6B656;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="210" y="170" width="130" height="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ================================================================ --> <!-- ARROWS – VNET PEERING --> <!-- ================================================================ --> <mxCell id="arrow-peer" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#9673A6;" edge="1" parent="1" source="hub-vnet" target="spoke-vnet"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow-peer-label" value="VNet Peering" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=8;fontColor=#9673A6;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="710" y="395" width="65" height="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ================================================================ --> <!-- TRAFFIC FLOW 1 – INGRESS (corp user → app via AGC) --> <!-- ================================================================ --> <mxCell id="tf-in-1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#107C10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="onprem-user" target="aks-approuting"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="120" y="285" /> <mxPoint x="250" y="200" /> <mxPoint x="1300" y="200" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tf-in-1-label" value="❶ Corp user → Internal LB → App Routing NGINX (via ER + peering)" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontSize=7;fontColor=#107C10;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="500" y="173" width="400" height="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="tf-in-2" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#107C10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="agc-resource" target="aks-albctrl"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tf-in-2-label" value="❷ AGC → ALB Controller → backend pods" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontSize=7;fontColor=#107C10;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1095" y="340" width="220" height="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ================================================================ --> <!-- TRAFFIC FLOW 2 – EGRESS (pods → hub FW → internet) --> <!-- ================================================================ --> <mxCell id="tf-eg-1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#E83123;dashed=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="aks-pod3" target="hub-fw"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="990" y="510" /> <mxPoint x="750" y="510" /> <mxPoint x="420" y="370" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tf-eg-1-label" value="❸ Pod egress → UDR → Hub Azure Firewall (FQDN filtering)" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontSize=7;fontColor=#E83123;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="500" y="510" width="300" height="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="tf-eg-2" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#E83123;" edge="1" parent="1" source="hub-fw" target="internet"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="420" y="860" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tf-eg-2-label" value="❹ Firewall → Internet (AzureKubernetesService FQDN tag + app rules)" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontSize=7;fontColor=#E83123;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="280" y="845" width="320" height="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ================================================================ --> <!-- TRAFFIC FLOW 3 – KUBECTL (DevOps → API server) --> <!-- ================================================================ --> <mxCell id="tf-kubectl" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#326CE5;dashed=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="onprem-devops" target="aks-apiserver"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="120" y="640" /> <mxPoint x="350" y="640" /> <mxPoint x="750" y="570" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tf-kubectl-label" value="❺ kubectl → Private API server (via ER + peering + Private DNS)" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontSize=7;fontColor=#326CE5;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="260" y="628" width="310" height="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ================================================================ --> <!-- TRAFFIC FLOW 4 – POD → PaaS (private endpoints) --> <!-- ================================================================ --> <mxCell id="tf-pe" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#68217A;dashed=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="aks-pod2" target="pe-acr"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="920" y="490" /> <mxPoint x="1200" y="400" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tf-pe-label" value="❻ Pod → Private Endpoints (ACR, KV, SQL, Storage)" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontSize=7;fontColor=#68217A;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1100" y="530" width="260" height="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ================================================================ --> <!-- TRAFFIC FLOW 5 – DNS RESOLUTION --> <!-- ================================================================ --> <mxCell id="tf-dns" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#82B366;dashed=1;dashPattern=2 4;" edge="1" parent="1" source="onprem-dns" target="hub-dns-box"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tf-dns-label" value="❼ DNS conditional forwarder → Azure Private DNS" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontSize=7;fontColor=#82B366;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="175" y="455" width="230" height="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ================================================================ --> <!-- TRAFFIC FLOW 6 – MONITORING --> <!-- ================================================================ --> <mxCell id="tf-mon" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#68217A;dashed=1;dashPattern=2 4;" edge="1" parent="1" source="aks-box" target="hub-prom"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="780" y="750" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tf-mon-label" value="❽ Metrics + logs → Managed Prometheus + Log Analytics" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontSize=7;fontColor=#68217A;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="500" y="760" width="270" height="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ================================================================ --> <!-- LEGEND --> <!-- ================================================================ --> <mxCell id="legend" value="" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F5F5;strokeColor=#CCCCCC;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="780" y="720" width="950" height="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend-title" value="<b>Traffic Flows</b>" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontColor=#333333;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="790" y="723" width="80" height="15" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l1" value="<font color="#107C10">━━</font> ❶❷ Ingress: Corp User → Internal LB → App Routing NGINX → Pods" style="text;html=1;fontSize=8;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="790" y="742" width="400" height="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l2" value="<font color="#E83123">╌╌</font> ❸❹ Egress: Pods → UDR → Hub Azure Firewall (FQDN tag) → Internet" style="text;html=1;fontSize=8;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="790" y="758" width="400" height="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l3" value="<font color="#326CE5">╌╌</font> ❺ kubectl: DevOps → ExpressRoute → Private API Server (VNet integrated)" style="text;html=1;fontSize=8;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="790" y="774" width="400" height="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l4" value="<font color="#68217A">╌╌</font> ❻ Pod → PaaS: Workload Identity + Private Endpoints (ACR, KV, SQL, Storage)" style="text;html=1;fontSize=8;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="790" y="790" width="420" height="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l5" value="<font color="#82B366">╌╌</font> ❼ DNS: On-prem conditional forwarder → Hub Private DNS Zones → private IPs" style="text;html=1;fontSize=8;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1210" y="742" width="420" height="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l6" value="<font color="#68217A">╌╌</font> ❽ Monitoring: Prometheus metrics + Container Insights → central Log Analytics" style="text;html=1;fontSize=8;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1210" y="758" width="420" height="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l7" value="<font color="#D6B656">━━</font> ExpressRoute / VPN | <font color="#9673A6">━━</font> VNet Peering | <font color="#E83123">PE</font> = Private Endpoint" style="text;html=1;fontSize=8;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1210" y="774" width="400" height="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l8" value="<font color="#0078D4">■</font> Preconfigured (immutable) | <font color="#107C10">■</font> Ingress controllers | <font color="#00BCF2">■</font> Scaling / NAP | <font color="#F25022">■</font> Workload pods" style="text;html=1;fontSize=8;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1210" y="790" width="450" height="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
</root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

g.text: AKS Automatic in ALZ Corp (Private Connectivity)
Egress forced through hub Azure Firewall via UDR. Ingress via App Routing internal LB. Open this file in diagrams.net to edit.
Log Analytics | Managed Prometheus | Azure Monitor Dashboards
DNS resolved via Hub Private DNS Zones
Not yet available on AKS Automatic
Node Resource Group (ReadOnly) - VMSS, LBs, Disks
1 Corp User -> Internal LB -> App Routing
-- 1-2 Ingress: Corp User -> ER -> Peering -> Internal LB -> App Routing NGINX -> Pods
-- 3-4 Egress: Pods -> UDR -> Hub Azure Firewall (FQDN tag) -> Internet
-- 5 kubectl: DevOps -> ER -> Peering -> API Server ILB (private.region.azmk8s.io)
-- 6 Pod -> PaaS: Workload Identity + Private Endpoints (ACR, KV, SQL, Storage)
-- 7 DNS: On-prem -> Conditional fwd (168.63.129.16) -> Hub Private DNS
-- 8 Monitoring: Prometheus + Container Insights -> Log Analytics
--- AGC: Not yet available on AKS Automatic / public frontend only
